Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 167 

SR_SPLMTL_DSBLTS_2_SW 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Disabilities 2: Difficulty Doing Errands Alone 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) disabilities descriptor where 
patient has difficulty doing errands alone such as visiting a doctor's office or shopping (15 years or 
older). 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_DSBLTS_2_SW 

TYPE: CHAR
